checks.name: hidden_text_check
checks.description: Search for text elements with fill matching background, opacity<0.1, or font-size<1px
detection_methods: Check fill attribute against known background colors (white, #ffffff, #fff)
Check opacity attribute for values below 0.1
Check font-size attribute for values below 1px
Check for display:none or visibility:hidden in style attributes

checks.name: answer_leak_check
checks.description: Search for any numeric values matching answer options within SVG non-label elements
detection_methods: Extract all text content from SVG
Flag any matches that are not dimension labels referenced in the question stem
Check metadata, comments, and hidden groups for answer content

checks.name: consistency_check
checks.description: Verify SVG dimensions match question stem values
detection_methods: Parse dimension labels from SVG text elements
Parse dimension values from question stem
Flag any mismatches or missing labels

checks.name: clarity_check
checks.description: Ensure shapes are clearly distinguishable and unambiguous
detection_methods: Verify stroke width is sufficient for visibility
Check that shapes do not overlap ambiguously
Ensure labels are positioned clearly near their referenced elements
Verify viewBox and dimensions allow adequate rendering

metadata.author: QA Team
metadata.applies_to: all SVG assets in question bank
